long_description:
[MON]-Sysdig Agent in ImagePullBackoff State [TOK] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/monitoring_pods_image_pull_backoff.html
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod imagepullbackoff issue in sysdig-agent-pod-monitoring
TIP Short Description: Pod image pull backoff
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::mzone2g7:sysdig-agent:sysdig-agent-compute-ppj2c
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum by(reason, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"sysdig-agent.*", agent_tag_cluster_type=~"rias.*|genctl.*", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff"}) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2g7' and kube_pod_name = 'sysdig-agent-compute-ppj2c' and reason = 'ErrImagePull'

Time:             12/09/2025 07:06 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/0ec21ec2-7b10-4e13-b1ee-56b3ae8e8f71?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F38627574%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [MON]-Sysdig Agent in ImagePullBackoff State [TOK]
Description:  sysdig-agent-pod-monitoring Sysdig Agents in ImagePullBackoff State
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum by(reason, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"sysdig-agent.*", agent_tag_cluster_type=~"rias.*|genctl.*", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff"}) > 0
Duration: 10 m
